sections.header: 8. Academic Toppers & General College Contact Information
sections.text: The following data is from the Academic Toppers (by Department and Year) table: Mohamed Jassim .M is the II Year topper from the Department of Civil Engineering. Veera Kumar .M is the III Year topper from the Department of Civil Engineering. Mohmood Naina .M.H is the IV Year topper from the Department of Civil Engineering. Salman is the II Year topper from the Department of Mechanical Engineering. Atef Jamaludeen .N is the III Year topper from the Department of Mechanical Engineering. Mohamed Nibras .M is the IV Year topper from the Department of Mechanical Engineering. Vinitha .M is the II Year topper from the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. Bhuvaneshwari .B is the III Year topper from the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. Mahalakshmi .R is the IV Year topper from the Department of Computer Science and Engineering.

The following data is from the General College Contact table: The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. The phone number is +91 99400 04500. The email address is msajce.office@gmail.com. The website is www.msajce-edu.in. The online admission link is <https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE>. The online fee payment link is <https://www.feepayr.com/>. For grievances, email grievance@msajce-edu.in or visit <https://www.msajce-edu.in/grievanceredressalcommittee.php>.

The incubation page provides the SIIF website at <https://www.siif.ventures/>, the IIC Ratings Certificate 2023-24 at [https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/RatingCertificate_2023-24.jpg](https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/RatingCertificate_2023-24.jpg), the IIC Ratings Certificate 2022-23 at [https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/RatingCertificate_2022-23.jpg](https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/RatingCertificate_2022-23.jpg), the IIC Ratings Certificate 2020-21 at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/2RatingCertificate2020-21.jpg>, and the IIC Ratings Certificate 2019-20 at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/images/research/1RatingCertificate2019-20.jpg>.

This chunk answers who the academic toppers are at MSAJCE, what the phone number of MSAJCE is, what the email address of MSAJCE is, where MSAJCE is located, how to apply online for admission at MSAJCE, how to pay fees online at MSAJCE, what the grievance email is at MSAJCE, what the SIIF website is, and what the MSAJCE IIC rating certificates are.

The following data is from the Incubation Lead table: Akshita K is the Incubation Lead with the email info@siif.ventures and website www.siif.ventures.

The following data is from the IIC President table: Mr. S. Vimalathithan is the IIC President with the email iic.head@msajce-edu.in.

The following data is from the Principal table: Dr. K.S. Srinivasan is the Principal with the email principal@msajce-edu.in.

The following data is from the Address table: The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103.

The following data is from the contact information table: The phone number is +91 99400 04500, the email is msajce.office@gmail.com, and the website is www.msajce-edu.in.
